blocks.text: I'VE  HEARD THAT  YOU'VE  BECOME VERY  CLOSE  WITH  MY BROTHER .
blocks.translation: لقد سمعت أنك أصبحت مقربًا جدًا من أخي.

blocks.text: THERE  WERE MANY  TWISTS  AND TURNS .
ASURASCANS.COM
IT  MUST HAVE  BEEN  A  GREAT OPPORTUNITY  FOR MUGEUK .
blocks.translation: لا بد أنها كانت فرصة عظيمة لموجوك.

blocks.text: THAT  WASN'T REALLY  THE  CASE . THE  SECOND  YOUNG MASTER  WAS  SO  CLEVER
blocks.translation: لم يكن الأمر كذلك حقًا. كان السيد الشاب الثاني ذكياً جدًا

blocks.text: THAT  I  HAD  MUCH  TO LEARN  FROM  HIM .
blocks.translation: لدرجة أنني كنت لأتعلم الكثير منه.

blocks.text: THE  SKY HEAVEN  CULT  LEADER IS  ACTUALLY  SPEAKING HIGHLY  OF  MUGEUK .
blocks.translation: قائد طائفة سماء السماوات يتحدث بإعجاب عن موجوك.

blocks.text: MY  BROTHER  IS INDEED  INTELLIGENT .
HE'S  THE SMARTEST  PERSON I'VE  EVER  MET .
blocks.translation: إنه أذكى شخص قابلته في حياتي.

blocks.text: THE  BLOOD  HEAVENS SWORD  DEMON  SAID  HE MOVED  HEARTS ,
blocks.translation: شيطان سيف دماء السماوات قال إنه يحرك القلوب،

blocks.text: AND  THE SKY  HEAVEN  CULT LEADER  SAYS  HE'S  THE SMARTEST  PERSON HE'S  EVER  SEEN .
blocks.translation: وقائد طائفة سماء السماوات يقول إنه أذكى شخص رآه في حياته.

blocks.text: BEING SMART  WHILE ALSO  HAVING  THE CHARM  TO  MOVE HEARTS ?
SUCH  PRAISE DOESN'T  SUIT MUGEUK .
blocks.translation: مثل هذا الثناء لا يليق بموجوك.

blocks.text: REGARDLESS , WHAT  BRINGS  SUCH HERE ?
blocks.translation: على كل حال، ما الذي جاء به إلى هنا؟

blocks.text: A  BUSY  PERSON
AREN'T  YOU  THE BUSIEST  PERSON  IN DIVINE  CULT ?
blocks.translation: ألست أنت الأكثر انشغالًا في الطائفة الإلهية؟

blocks.text: THE  HEAVENLY  DEMON
IF  YOU'LL JOIN  HANDS WITH  ME ,
ASURASCANS.COM
I  CAN GIVE  YOU  THE  TWO THINGS  THAT  YOU DESIRE
blocks.translation: يمكنني أن أمنحك أكثر ما ترغب به

blocks.text: MOST .
ABSOLUTE REGRESSION
JP
SCRIPT ART  PARK  JIN  HWAN ORIGINAL  JANG  YUNGHOON
blocks.translation: السيناريو والفن بارك جين هوان الأصل جانغ يونغهون

blocks.text: WHERE  IS  THE SECOND  YOUNG MASTER ?
HE  HASN'T RETURNED  YET .
ES
YOU  WERE  LEFT HERE  ALONE  IN  SOLITUDE . HOW  IS  THAT  DIFFERENT FROM  BEING  BOUND IN  SHACKLES ?
blocks.translation: لقد تُركت هنا وحيدًا في عزلتك. كيف يختلف هذا عن القيود؟

blocks.text: YOU  SAY  THAT BECAUSE  YOU'VE  NEVER ACTUALLY  BEEN  BOUND IN  SHACKLES .
blocks.translation: تقول ذلك لأنك لم تُقيد بالقيود فعلاً.

blocks.text: WOULD YOU  LIKE  TO  GIVE IT  A  TRY ?
NEVER  MIND , NEVER  MIND .
ASURASCANS.COM
LISTEN , I  HAVE  ONE REQUEST .
GO  AHEAD AND  SAY  IT .
WHEN  WE  MEET IN  PERSON ...
COULDN'T WE  SPEAK  MORE CASUALLY ?
blocks.translation: ألا يمكننا التحدث بشكل أكثر ودية؟

blocks.text: CULT LEADER .
YES ! THAT'S  IT ...
YOU  GAVE  UP THE  PRESTIGIOUS  POSITION OF  CULT  LEADER  FOR  ME .  HOW COULD  I  NOT  GRANT  SUCH A  SMALL  REQUEST ?
blocks.translation: تنازلت عن منصب قائد الطائفة المهيب من أجلي. كيف لي ألا أوافق على طلب صغير كهذا؟

blocks.text: BUT ...
THAT DOES  RAISE  A CONCERN .
WHICH  IS ?
RIGHT  NOW  YOU HAVE  SUCH  HIGH  ESTEEM FOR  ME ,  BUT  WHAT  IF  YOU DESPISE  ME  LATER ?
blocks.translation: أنت تحترمني الآن، لكن ماذا لو احتقرتني لاحقًا؟

blocks.text: IF  YOU  COME  TO HATE  ME ,  THIS  CASUAL SPEECH  WILL  GET  ON YOUR  NERVES .
blocks.translation: إذا كرهتني، فإن هذه المحادثة الودية ستغضبك.

blocks.text: Le
BY  THEN , THE  DYNAMIC
WOULD
BE  SHATTERED
ANYWAY , SO  WHAT  DOES  IT MATTER ?
ESPECIALLY SINCE  I'LL  HAVE ALREADY  LOST YOU .
I  REALLY  LOATHED THIS  PERSON  FOR SO  LONG ...
BUT  NO  ONE HAS  AS  HIGH  OF AN  OPINION  OF  ME AS  THIS  PERSON DOES .
blocks.translation: لكن لا أحد لديه رأي عالي تجاهي كما لديه.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
FINE ,  JUST DON'T  REGRET IT  LATER .
REGRET  IS MY  BURDEN .
DON'T
WORRY .
BUT  WHY DID  YOU  COME TODAY ?
YOU  DIDN'T COME  JUST  TO SAY  THAT ...
DID  THE  FIRST YOUNG  MASTER GO  LOOKING
blocks.translation: هل ذهب السيد الشاب الأول يبحث عنك؟

blocks.text: FOR  YOU ?
HOW  DID YOU  KNOW ?
I  HAD A  FEELING .  WHAT FIRST  YOUNG
blocks.translation: شعرت بذلك. ما الذي قدمه السيد الشاب الأول؟

blocks.text: DID  THE MASTER
OFFER
YOU ?
blocks.translation: وعد بدعم توسع سهول الوسط إذا أصبحت حليفه.

blocks.text: SA
HE  PROMISED  TO SUPPORT  THE  CENTRAL PLAINS  EXPANSION  IF  I BECAME  HIS  ALLY .
HE  SAID  IF THE  SECOND  YOUNG MASTER  PROMISED  TO BUILD  ME  A  BRANCH  THERE , HE'D  BUILD  A  WHOLE DIVISION .
blocks.translation: قال إن السيد الشاب الثاني وعد ببناء فرع لي هناك، فسوف يبني فرقة كاملة.

blocks.text: THOSE  ARE PROMISES  THAT  CAN'T BE  KEPT .  THEY'RE LIES .
blocks.translation: وهي وعود لا يمكن الوفاء بها، إنها أكاذيب.

blocks.text: WHY  ARE  YOU SO  CERTAIN ?
HE'S  SOMEONE  WHO UNCONDITIONALLY  OBEYS HIS  FATHER'S  WILL .
blocks.translation: إنه شخص يطيع إرادة والده بلا تحفظ.

blocks.text: HE'S NOTHING  LIKE  THE SECOND  YOUNG  MASTER , WHO  HAS  TENDENCIES TO  BE  OUT  OF THE  NORM .
blocks.translation: لا يشبه السيد الشاب الثاني الذي لديه ميولات للخروج عن المألوف.

blocks.text: ASURASCANS.COM
HE  WILL ABSOLUTELY  NOT ALLOW  THE  SKY  HEAVEN CULT  TO  EXPAND  INTO  THE CENTRAL  PLAINS  BECAUSE THAT  GOES  AGAINST  HIS FATHER'S  WISHES .
blocks.translation: لن يسمح مطلقًا لطائفة سماء السماوات بالتوسع في سهول الوسط لأن ذلك ضد رغبات والده.

blocks.text: IF  THE  FIRST  YOUNG MASTER  BECOMES  THE  HEAVENLY DEMON ,  THE  SKY  HEAVEN  CULT  WILL NEVER  BE  ABLE  TO  REACH  EVEN A  PALM - SIZED  PLAQUE  IN  THE CENTRAL  PLAINS .
blocks.translation: إذا أصبح السيد الشاب الأول شيطان السماوات، فلن تستطيع الطائفة أن تصل حتى إلى لوحة بحجم الكف في سهول الوسط.

blocks.text: AREN'T  YOU BEING  BIASED  IN  YOUR JUDGMENT  BECAUSE  YOU'RE ON  THE  SECOND  YOUNG MASTER'S  SIDE ?
blocks.translation: ألا تنحاز للحكم لأنك من جانب السيد الشاب الثاني؟

blocks.text: ميل
WHAT  ELSE  DID HE  PROPOSE ?
THERE WAS  NO  OTHER PROPOSAL .
YOU  ALWAYS HAVE  A  TELL  WHEN YOU  LIE .
I  DO ? WHAT  TELL ?
DID  HE OFFER  ME ?
HE  PROMISED TO  RETURN  ME  TO YOU ,  DIDN'T  HE ?
ASURASCANS.COM
IF  IT  WAS  AN  OFFER CAPABLE  OF  SHAKING  THE CULT  LEADER ,  THAT'D  BE THE  MOST  LIKELY .
blocks.translation: لو كان عرضًا قادرًا على هز قائد الطائفة، لكان هو الأرجح.

blocks.text: THE  FIRST YOUNG  MASTER IS  REMARKABLY CLEVER ,  TOO .
blocks.translation: السيد الشاب الأول ذكي بشكل ملحوظ أيضًا.

blocks.text: THE  FIRST YOUNG  MASTER  IS NOT  A  TRULY  CLEVER PERSON .
blocks.translation: السيد الشاب الأول ليس شخصًا ذكيًا حقًا.

blocks.text: A  TRULY CLEVER  PERSON WOULDN'T  FIGHT  WITH THE  SECOND  YOUNG MASTER .
blocks.translation: الشخص الذكي حقًا لا يتشاجر مع السيد الشاب الثاني.

blocks.text: YOU'RE  TOO OBSESSED  WITH  THE SECOND  YOUNG MASTER .
blocks.translation: أنت مهووس جدًا بالسيد الشاب الثاني.

blocks.text: SO  WHAT  DID YOU  SAY ?
DON'T WORRY .  I  REFUSED DECISIVELY .
DON'T  LIE .
YOU'RE  SCHEMING  ON HOW  TO  GET  ME  BACK  BY EXPLOITING  THE  CONFLICT BETWEEN  THE  TWO OF  THEM .
blocks.translation: أنت تخطط لاستعادتي مستغلًا الصراع بينهما.

blocks.text: THE  FACT  THAT YOU  CAME  LOOKING FOR  ME  WAS  ALSO  TO TEST  WHETHER  THERE WAS  A  WAY  TO DO  SO .
blocks.translation: وحقًا جئت لاختبار ما إذا كان ذلك ممكنًا.

blocks.text: DO  I ... REALLY  HAVE A  TELL ?
CULT  LEADER ,  WHY  DO YOU  KEEP  FORGETTING ? YOU  SAID  IT  CLEARLY  WITH YOUR  OWN  MOUTH , DIDN'T  YOU ?
blocks.translation: قائد الطائفة، لماذا تنسى؟ قلتها بوضوح بنفسك، أليس كذلك؟

blocks.text: THAT YOU  CAN'T  POSSIBLY MATCH  THESE  CLEVER PEOPLE .
blocks.translation: أنك لا تستطيع منافسة هؤلاء الأذكياء.

blocks.text: YOU  SAY  THAT , BUT  THEN  WHY  DO YOU  KEEP  TRYING TO  BE  CUNNING ?
blocks.translation: تقول ذلك، فلماذا تظل تحاول المكر؟

blocks.text: THAT'S ...
YOUR FAULT ...
THIS  WOULD  ONLY MAKE  MY  RESOLUTION MORE  FIRM .
ASURASCANS.COM
I'M  SORRY . I  KNEW  BETTER , BUT  STILL  ACTED FOOLISHLY .
blocks.translation: أنا آسف. كنت أعلم أفضل، لكنني تصرفت بحماقة.

blocks.text: YOU  HAVE  TO FIGHT  WITH  DIFFERENT STRENGTHS .
YOU  HAVE  TO  USE DIFFERENT
blocks.translation: عليك استخدام سحر مختلف كسلاح ضد العقلاء.

blocks.text: CHARMS AS  WEAPONS  AGAINST PEOPLE  WHO  USE THEIR  MINDS .
DO  I  HAVE CHARM ?  WHAT CHARM ?
IF  YOU  HAD NO  CHARM ,
THEN  I'D STILL  BE  BOUND IN  SHACKLES .
THE  ONLY PERSON  WHO'D  TALK LIKE  THAT  TO  ME ...
blocks.translation: الشخص الوحيد الذي يتحدث إلي هكذا...

blocks.text: IS  YOU .
ASURASCANS.COM
NO , YOU'RE  JUST FIXATED  ON  WHAT YOU'VE  LOST .
BECAUSE  YOU ISIT  IN  THAT  POSITION OF  POWER  AND  LOOK DOWN  ON  OTHERS CARELESSLY .
blocks.translation: لأنك تجلس على ذلك المقعد وتنظر بازدراء للآخرين.

blocks.text: NOW  THAT  YOU'VE TRULY  COME  OUT  INTO THE  WORLD ,
blocks.translation: الآن بعدما خرجت إلى العالم حقًا،

blocks.text: IF  YOU  SHOWED WHAT  KIND  OF  PERSON  YOU REALLY  ARE ,  THERE  WOULD  BE MANY  WHO'D  SAY  SUCH THINGS  TO  YOU .
blocks.translation: لو أظهرت حقيقتك، سيكون هناك الكثير من يقولون مثل هذه الكلمات.

blocks.text: WHEN  THAT  TIME COMES ,  YOU  MIGHT SPEAK  OF  ME  IN SUCH  TERMS .
blocks.translation: حينها ربما تتحدث عني بهذا الوصف.

blocks.text: OH , THOSE  SHACKLES FROM  BACK  THEN ?  I WONDER  IF  THEY'RE STILL  IN  GOOD CONDITION .
blocks.translation: أوه، هل تلك القيود القديمة لا تزال بحالة جيدة؟

blocks.text: THAT'S RIDICULOUS TALK .
CULT LEADER ,
THINK  OF  ME AS  A  BONFIRE .  STAND A  LITTLE  DISTANCE  AWAY AND  WARM  YOURSELF BY  THE  FLAMES .
blocks.translation: فكر بي كموقد نار. ابدأ بالوقوف من بعيد وسخّن نفسك بناره.

blocks.text: IF  YOU  HOLD ME  TOO  CLOSE ,  YOU'LL GET  BURNED ,  AND  SOOT WILL  COVER  YOU COMPLETELY .
blocks.translation: إذا اقتربت كثيرًا، ستحترق وتغطيك السخام.

blocks.text: ... DON'T REMEMBER  ME  AS  THE CULT  LEADER  FROM BACK  THEN .
blocks.translation: ... لا تذكرني كقائد الطائفة ذلك الحين.

blocks.text: CULT LEADER ,
FROM  TODAY  ON ,
BEFORE
blocks.translation: قبل أن تنام، ردد هذه الكلمات خمس مرات.

blocks.text: YOU  SLEEP , CHANT  THESE  WORDS FIVE  TIMES .
WHAT WORDS ?
